caption:
The cutest spot to visit in Tokyo🇯🇵

A unique experience with melting bear in a hot pot🐻🍲You can choose different broths and ingredients, and each little bear is made from collagen for extra flavour ✨

📍 Kumachan Onsen, Shibuya, Tokyo (best to book online in advance)

🗺️🎁When exploring Japan you can get 10% off on experiences on Klook.com with the code TRAVELOFFER
